summary: A clip from a CBS Mornings segment with a 'WHAT TO WATCH' banner and chyron reading 'TODDLER STEALS THE SHOW IN THE OVAL OFFICE'. One frame shows a small child crawling on the patterned Oval Office rug. Another frame is a split screen with an anchor at left labeled 'CBS BROADCAST CENTER' and a woman holding the toddler at right labeled 'CBS NEWS WASHINGTON'.

script.scene: A small child crawls on the Oval Office rug; chyron 'TODDLER STEALS THE SHOW IN THE OVAL OFFICE'.
Split screen: an anchor labeled 'CBS BROADCAST CENTER' and a woman holding the toddler labeled 'CBS NEWS WASHINGTON'.
